step.name: day-1-artefact-pull
step.action: Build inventory.md: every file/ticket/channel with URL, last-modified, 10-word summary.
step.decision-gate: If inventory empty, escalate access to engagement manager same-day.

step.name: day-2-stakeholder-map
step.action: Build stakeholders.md with: full name, role, decision authority (Approve/Consult/Inform/None), preferred channel, "what they care about".

step.name: day-3-glossary
step.action: Capture ≥ 15 domain terms with source + contested flag.

step.name: day-4-process-baseline
step.action: Draw 1+ swimlane/BPMN diagram (6-15 steps, 2-5 lanes) of the as-is core process. Lanes labelled with named owners.

step.name: day-5-gap-memo-and-signoff
step.action: Author risks.md with top 5 gaps + top 5 risks (L×I 1-3) + open questions. Request PM signoff in writing.
step.decision-gate: Do not start requirements writing until sign-off committed.
